slices.focus: A lot has shifted lately, and this past weekend kind of forced the issue at home
slices.summary: Honestly I think it was the embarrassment more than the pain
decisions: After bruising her hip by missing the front step, Dorothy reluctantly agreed to a home health assessment and grab-bar in
Dorothy's near-fall intensified caregiving again, and Caleb and Lena now need more joint planning and patience around he
